{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/123030563?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/nskath/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/nskath/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/nskath/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/nskath/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/nskath", "id": 123030563, "login": "nskath", "node_id": "U_kgDOB1VMIw", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/nskath/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/nskath/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/nskath/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/nskath/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/nskath/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/nskath", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": null, "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 6.2, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:L/UI:A/VC:N/VI:L/VA:N/SC:N/SI:H/SA:H"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-22", "name": "Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory ('Path Traversal')"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-73", "name": "External Control of File Name or Path"}], "description": "### Impact

A path traversal vulnerability in Entire CLI allows an attacker with push access to the checkpoints repository to craft malicious checkpoint metadata that causes `entire session resume` or `entire checkpoint rewind` to write attacker-controlled transcript data outside of the expected session directory.

The issue occurs because checkpoint metadata is fetched from the remote `entire/checkpoints/v1` branch and the `SessionID` field was used to construct filesystem paths without validation in the restore path. A malicious `SessionID` containing absolute paths or path traversal sequences could cause arbitrary files on the victim’s machine to be overwritten.

### Patches

The patched versions (`v0.7.7` or `v0.7.8-nightly.*`) observe stronger input validation and enforce traversal-resistant primitives to ensure that only descending directories can be accessed by the affected commands. 

### Workarounds
If upgrading immediately is not possible:

- Do not run `entire session resume` or `entire checkpoint rewind` on repositories where untrusted users can push to `entire/checkpoints/v1`.
- Restrict push access to shared repositories until all collaborators have upgraded.
- Inspect the `entire/checkpoints/v1` branch for suspicious checkpoint metadata before resuming or rewinding.
- Remove or protect shell initialization files and other sensitive user-writable files where feasible.

These mitigations reduce exposure but do not fully address the vulnerability. Upgrading is recommended.

### Credits
Thanks Navtej Kathuria for privately reporting this issue to the Entire Security team.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-2h46-9x5w-4wf7", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-19T15:00:01Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-2h46-9x5w-4wf7", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-2h46-9x5w-4wf7"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-19T15:00:01Z", "references": ["https://github.com/entireio/cli/security/advisories/GHSA-2h46-9x5w-4wf7", "https://github.com/entireio/cli/pull/1365", "https://github.com/entireio/cli/pull/1449", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-2h46-9x5w-4wf7"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/entireio/cli/security-advisories/GHSA-2h46-9x5w-4wf7", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/entireio/cli", "summary": "Entire CLI: Path traversal in checkpoint session metadata allows arbitrary file write during resume/rewind", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-22T18:51:46Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-2h46-9x5w-4wf7", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "0.7.7", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/entireio/cli"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 0.7.6"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Entire CLI: Path traversal in checkpoint session metadata allows arbitrary file write during resume/rewind
